rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level for Ukraine; US focus on Iran deal keeps Western attention divided, which is a persistent concern for Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war: active combat continues
top_events.summary: War on Ukrainian territory continues with no ceasefire or qualitative shift. Daily life remains defined by strikes, mobilization, and infrastructure risk.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal dominates US attention; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: US diplomatic energy focused on Iran deal means continued divided attention away from Ukraine aid and support — a persistent background risk for Ukrainians.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon amid Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Broader Middle East escalation further pulls US and Western focus away from Ukraine, marginally worsening Ukraine's diplomatic position.
